name: Frost Moon Round Table: A Soft Blue Sky
description: A round table commonly seen around Frostmoon Enclave. Crafted from pedunculate oak wood, offers superior durability and water resistance, making it useful for a wide range of settings.\nThe craftspeople of the Frostmoon Scions, drawing inspiration from the bright moon hanging high in the night sky, paired this moon-like round table with a soft sky-blue tablecloth, giving it the tranquility and warmth of the night sky.
